channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The dirty little secret behind my carry-on-only travel strategy
item.description: Here's a look at my best practices for the laundry-averse and how they make packing for trips as long as two weeks totally doable in a carry-on.

item.title: Chicken Schnitzel
item.description: You guys are obsessed with my Pork Schnitzel, so I knew I had to make a chicken version! Thin-pounded, lightlyâ¦

item.title: India has changed its startup rules for deep tech
item.description: India is adjusting startup rules to help more of its deep tech startups with funding and long-term success.

item.title: 4 Best AI Notetakers (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: A growing collection of pocket-sized gadgets lets you record your meetings and extract value from them. Here are our favorites.

item.title: From Svedka to Anthropic, brands make bold plays with AI in Super Bowl ads
item.description: From the first AI-generated Big Game ad courtesy of Svedka to Anthropic's beef with OpenAI, here are the biggest ads from Super Bowl LX.

item.title: I Have Fallen in Love With Open Earbuds (and You Should Too)
item.description: From jogging and cycling to multitasking or puttering around the house, open earbuds are an excellent way to jam out in the real world.

item.title: Lovebirds can get a marriage license at this airport pop-up in Las Vegas
item.description: The Las Vegas airport operates a temporary marriage license bureau each February.

item.title: New York lawmakers propose a three-year pause on new data centers
item.description: Although the billâs prospects are uncertain, New York is at least the sixth state to consider pausing construction of new data centers.
